'''鈭歳-k-t''' ('''sharakat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nanoelectroablate|nanoelectroablate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-k-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nanoelectroablate|nanoelectroablate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-k-t
|-
! Lemma
| sharakat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirakat|thirakat]] || [[word:jirakat|jirakat]] || [[word:shirakat|shirakat]] || [[word:kirakat|kirakat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurakat|thuthurakat]] || [[word:jujurakat|jujurakat]] || [[word:shushurakat|shushurakat]] || [[word:kukurakat|kukurakat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurakat|thurakat]] || [[word:jurakat|jurakat]] || [[word:shurakat|shurakat]] || [[word:kurakat|kurakat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurakat|thurakat]] || [[word:jurakat|jurakat]] || [[word:shurakat|shurakat]] || [[word:kurakat|kurakat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therakat|therakat]] || [[word:jerakat|jerakat]] || [[word:sherakat|sherakat]] || [[word:kerakat|kerakat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorakat|thothorakat]] || [[word:jojorakat|jojorakat]] || [[word:shoshorakat|shoshorakat]] || [[word:kokorakat|kokorakat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorakat|thorakat]] || [[word:jorakat|jorakat]] || [[word:shorakat|shorakat]] || [[word:korakat|korakat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorakat|thorakat]] || [[word:jorakat|jorakat]] || [[word:shorakat|shorakat]] || [[word:korakat|korakat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙rakat|th忙rakat]] || [[word:j忙rakat|j忙rakat]] || [[word:sh忙rakat|sh忙rakat]] || [[word:k忙rakat|k忙rakat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharakat|thatharakat]] || [[word:jajarakat|jajarakat]] || [[word:shasharakat|shasharakat]] || [[word:kakarakat|kakarakat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharakat|tharakat]] || [[word:jarakat|jarakat]] || [[word:sharakat|sharakat]] || [[word:karakat|karakat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharakat|tharakat]] || [[word:jarakat|jarakat]] || [[word:sharakat|sharakat]] || [[word:karakat|karakat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharakat|sharakat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharakat|gosharakat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharakat|gokisharakat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharakatn眉|sharakatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharakatnkn眉|gosharakatnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharakatn眉|gokisharakatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharakatsh毛|sharakatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharakatnksh毛|gosharakatnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharakatsh毛|gokisharakatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharakatro|sharakatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharakatnkro|gosharakatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharakatro|gokisharakatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharakatmu|sharakatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharakatnkmu|gosharakatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharakatmu|gokisharakatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharakatsher|sharakatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharakatnksher|gosharakatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharakatsher|gokisharakatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharakatng|sharakatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharakatnkng|gosharakatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharakatng|gokisharakatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharakatya|sharakatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharakatnkya|gosharakatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharakatya|gokisharakatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharakatyam|sharakatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharakatnkyam|gosharakatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharakatyam|gokisharakatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharakatn眉sh毛|sharakatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharakatnkn眉sh毛|gosharakatnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharakatn眉sh毛|gokisharakatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharakatn眉ro|sharakatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharakatnkn眉ro|gosharakatnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharakatn眉ro|gokisharakatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharakatn眉mu|sharakatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharakatnkn眉mu|gosharakatnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharakatn眉mu|gokisharakatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharakatsh毛n眉|sharakatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharakatnksh毛n眉|gosharakatnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharakatsh毛n眉|gokisharakatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharakatsh毛ro|sharakatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharakatnksh毛ro|gosharakatnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharakatsh毛ro|gokisharakatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharakatsh毛mu|sharakatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharakatnksh毛mu|gosharakatnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharakatsh毛mu|gokisharakatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharakatron眉|sharakatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharakatnkron眉|gosharakatnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharakatron眉|gokisharakatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharakatrosh毛|sharakatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharakatnkrosh毛|gosharakatnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharakatrosh毛|gokisharakatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharakatromu|sharakatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharakatnkromu|gosharakatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharakatromu|gokisharakatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharakatmun眉|sharakatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharakatnkmun眉|gosharakatnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharakatmun眉|gokisharakatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharakatmush毛|sharakatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharakatnkmush毛|gosharakatnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharakatmush毛|gokisharakatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharakatmuro|sharakatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharakatnkmuro|gosharakatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharakatmuro|gokisharakatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
